project_name: Mud Patch Garment Reusability AI Engine

components.rvs_visualizer: Circular progress ring or gauge built with pure SVG or Recharts, using primary green for high scores, amber for medium, and terracotta for low scores.
components.cards: Flat background (no glassmorphism for health/sustainable dashboard unless header), 1px subtle border (#e6ede7), generous internal padding (p-6).
components.buttons: Solid primary color for primary actions, subtle ghost/outline variants for secondary. Must have hover and focus states.
components.inputs: Shadcn standard but with 8px border radius and focus ring colored with primary light (#a7c957).
components.tables: Clean, dense rows (p-3), alternating very subtle background tints, distinct status badges for garment conditions.

hero_background.description: Abstract green leaf texture for login or empty states

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the 'Organic Earthy' archetype. Do not use harsh black or pure gray; instead, tint grays with slight green/brown hues.
The application is a functional SaaS dashboard. Prioritize readability, scanability, and clear data hierarchy.
Implement the RVS (Reusability Value Score) formula visualization prominently as it's the core feature.
Use Shadcn UI components extensively but customize the border radii and color palette to match these guidelines.
Ensure all interactive elements have a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="upload-garment-button"`).
Use 'Outfit' for all headings and 'Figtree' for body copy. Update Tailwind config to reflect these fonts.
Integrate Recharts for analytics on the Super Admin Dashboard.
